testcase.name: Login should be success
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to the application.....................................passed And User click the Account menu.............................................passed And User click on the login link............................................passed And User enter the email as "demo1.123@gmail.com"...........................passed And User enter the password as "Demo@123"...................................passed When User click on the login button.........................................passed Then My Account should be displayed.........................................passed

testcase.name: Login should not be success
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to the application.....................................passed And User click the Account menu.............................................passed And User click on the login link............................................passed And User enter the email as "demo1.123@gmail.com"...........................passed And User enter the empty password as "".....................................passed When User click on the login button.........................................passed Then Login should be unsuccessful...........................................passed

testcase.name: Valid registration

failure.message: function timed out, ensure the promise resolves within 5000 milliseconds

testcase.failure: Error: function timed out, ensure the promise resolves within 5000 milliseconds at Timeout.<anonymous> (D:\EXPLEO - SmartCliff_Training\Git\11_Playwright_BDD\Playwright-BDD\node_modules\@cucumber\cucumber\src\time.ts:50:14) at listOnTimeout (node:internal/timers:605:17) at processTimers (node:internal/timers:541:7)
testcase.system-out: Given User navigated to the application.....................................passed And User clicks the Account menu............................................passed And User click on the register link.........................................passed And User enter the first name as "Example"..................................passed And User enter the last name as "Ex"........................................passed And User enter the Email as "example1.123@gmail.com"........................passed And User enter the telephone as "1234567890"................................passed And User enter the Password as "Example@123"................................passed And User enter the conform password as "Example@123"........................passed And User click the policy check box.........................................passed When User click on the continue button......................................passed Then success should be displayed............................................failed

testcase.name: Register with an existing email
testcase.system-out: Given User navigated to the application.....................................passed And User clicks the Account menu............................................passed And User click on the register link.........................................passed And User enter the first name as "Demo".....................................passed And User enter the last name as "D".........................................passed And User enter the Email as "demo.1@gmail.com"..............................passed And User enter the telephone as "1234567890"................................passed And User enter the Password as "Demo@123"...................................passed And User enter the conform password as "Demo@123"...........................passed And User click the policy check box.........................................passed When User click on the continue button......................................passed Then Existing account warning should be displayed...........................passed
